new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift project kick-off
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra is starting a non-clinical pay uplift project and needs the HR Systems team to engage. Main holiday season is approaching and calendars are filling up, so early coordination is required to plan resource allocation and timeline.
